title: Sinhala and Tamil New Year
text: For Sinhala and Tamil New Year, Sri Lankan shoppers often prefer sweetmeat hampers, tea, fruits, grocery bundles, flowers for hosts, and respectful family gifts. Mid budgets commonly sit around Rs 3000-8000; premium office or family hampers can exceed Rs 10000.

title: Wedding gifting
text: Sri Lankan wedding gifts lean toward elegant homeware, vouchers, jewelry, watches, premium flowers, and useful cash-equivalent gifts. The tone should be respectful and celebratory.

title: Romantic gifts
text: For girlfriend, wife, anniversary, or apology contexts, flowers plus cake or chocolate is a strong bundle. Perfume is premium and intimate; ask about scent preference if possible.

title: Sympathy gifts
text: For funerals, avoid overly bright romantic gifts. Recommend white flowers, fruit baskets, simple grocery support, or respectful sympathy arrangements.

title: Delivery expectations
text: Colombo customers often expect same-day or next-day delivery. Rural and outstation delivery needs earlier planning, address clarity, and delivery quote confirmation.

title: Daily essentials
text: For groceries, fruits, vegetables, baby care, petcare, and health essentials, prioritize usefulness, delivery speed, substitutions, and clear budget filtering.

title: Sinhala examples
text: Sinhala mode should stay warm and natural. Example: Eka hari lassana adahasak. Budget eka kohomada? Occasion eka birthday da, nathnam surprise ekak da?
